14 June 2026 Re: Application for Position Title
To
Hiring Manager Name
Their Job Title
Subject
Application for Position Title — Muhammad Kashif
Dear Hiring Manager Name,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Position Title role at Company Name. With over eight years of hands-on experience as an AI-Powered Brand Designer and Creative Specialist for Amazon sellers, I bring a rare combination of strategic design thinking, advanced AI tooling, and deep e-commerce expertise that I am confident will add measurable value to your team.

Throughout my career, I have directed the full visual lifecycle of seven or more major U.S.-based brands — including Angelus, Tarrago, Eagle Shoe Care, Leather Hero, and Fiamme. My work spans high-converting Amazon Main Images, immersive A+ Enhanced Brand Content, competitor-informed infographic systems, and complete brand identity packages. Every deliverable I produce is grounded in data, driven by market research, and executed to the highest creative standard.

8+
Years Experience
200+

7+
Major Brands Managed

What sets me apart is my use of generative AI tools — Midjourney, DALL·E, Stable Diffusion, and ComfyUI — to produce 8K-resolution lifestyle composites that rival expensive studio shoots, delivered faster and at lower cost.

I am particularly drawn to Company Name because of your specific reason here. I believe my background aligns strongly with your need for a designer who can key requirement from job description, and I am excited by the opportunity to contribute to your team’s continued growth.

I have attached my CV, Resume, and Portfolio for your review. I am available at your convenience for a call or interview and would welcome the chance to discuss how I can directly benefit Company Name.

Yours sincerely,
Muhammad Kashif
